expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and evaluates it: “The benchmark focus is: ‘review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes.’” It further explains it cannot be validated due to missing Phase 5a artifacts, but the case focus is still explicitly covered and used as the evaluation lens.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The output is scoped to Phase 5a requirements and artifacts: result.md lists Phase 5a proof artifacts (review_notes with “## Coverage Preservation Audit”, review_delta disposition, qa_plan_phase5a draft) and concludes alignment: “Output aligns with primary phase phase5a: Yes (this result is scoped strictly to Phase 5a contract and required artifacts/gates).” execution_notes.md also states checks performed for Phase 5a alignment.
